title: eriogonum sphaerocephalum var. sphaerocephalum
intro: Eriogonum sphaerocephalum var. sphaerocephalum, also known as Globe Mallow, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant compounds, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Globe Mallow include relieving respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Globe Mallow can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and it is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
